---
name: Documentation
description: Fix or improve documentation (README, breaking changes, translations)
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## What needs changing?

- **Type:** (e.g. typo, outdated section, missing topic, broken link, translation EN↔TR)
- **Location:** (e.g. `README.md`, `README.tr.md`, `docs/BREAKING-CHANGES-NET10.md`, client README under `clients/`)

## Current state

What’s wrong or missing? (quote or describe.)

## Suggested change

How it should read or what to add.

## Language(s)

- [ ] English (`README.md`, `docs/BREAKING-CHANGES-NET10.md`)
- [ ] Turkish (`README.tr.md`, `docs/BREAKING-CHANGES-NET10.tr.md`)
- [ ] Both (keep EN and TR in sync)
